title: Okhla Sanctuary
tagline: Okhla Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: Okhla Bird Sanctuary is a bird sanctuary at the Okhla barrage over Yamuna River.
overview.description: Okhla Bird Sanctuary is a bird sanctuary at the Okhla barrage over Yamuna River. It is situated in Noida, Gautam Buddh Nagar district, on Delhi-Uttar Pradesh state border and known as a haven for over 300 bird species, especially waterbirds. In 1990, an area of 3.5 square kilometres (1.4 sq mi) on the river Yamuna was designated a bird sanctuary by the Government of Uttar Pradesh under the Wildlife Protection Act, 1972. The site is located at the point where the river enters Uttar Pradesh.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Rashtriya Dalit Prerna Sthal and Green Garden
topPlaces.description: The Rashtriya Dalit Prerna Sthal and Green Garden is a memorial in Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India. It was commissioned by former Chief Minister of Uttar Pradesh Mayawati and inaugurated on 14 October 2011.

image.alt: Rashtriya Dalit Prerna Sthal and Green Garden

topPlaces.name: Okhla Vihar metro station
topPlaces.description: The Okhla Vihar metro station is located on the Magenta Line of the Delhi Metro. It is located in Abul Fazal Enclave just behind Jamia Nagar Police station.

topPlaces.name: All India Muslim Majlis-e-Mushawarat
topPlaces.description: All India Muslim Majlis-e-Mushawarat (AIMMM or MMM) is a federation of various Muslim organisations in India. Majlis-e-Mushawarat was formally launched at a two-day (August 8–9) meeting in 1964 at the Islamic seminary Darul Uloom Nadwatul Ulama, Lucknow.

topPlaces.name: Jamiatul Qasim Darul Uloom Al-Islamiah
topPlaces.description: Jamiatul Qasim Darul Uloom -il-Islamia is an Islamic seminary in India. The Jamia was established by Mufti Mahfoozur Rahman Usmani, an Islamic scholar of India in 1989 at the Indo-Nepal border, in Supaul, Bihar.

topPlaces.name: Shaheen Bagh
topPlaces.description: Shaheen Bagh is a neighbourhood in the South East Delhi district of Delhi, India. It is on the U.P border and southernmost colony of the Okhla (Jamia Nagar) area, situated along the banks of the Yamuna.

topPlaces.name: Jamia Millia Islamia metro station
topPlaces.description: The Jamia Millia Islamia metro station is located on the Magenta Line of the Delhi Metro which was inaugurated on 25 December 2017 by Prime Minister Narendra Modi. Jamia Millia Islamia is part of Phase III of Delhi Metro, on the Magenta Line.

topPlaces.name: Nangli Wazidpur
topPlaces.description: Nangli Wazidpur is a village in the western part of the state of Uttar Pradesh. It forms part of the New Okhla Industrial Development Authority's planned industrial city, Noida, falling in Sector-135, noida.

topPlaces.name: Noida
topPlaces.description: Noida, short for New Okhla Industrial Development Authority, is a city located in Gautam Buddha Nagar district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. It is a part of the National Capital Region (NCR).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Okhla Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Okhla Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Okhla Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Indira Gandhi International Airport, Delhi (20 km) and the nearest railway station is New Delhi Railway Station (12 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Okhla Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Okhla Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Okhla Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Okhla Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Okhla Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Rashtriya Dalit Prerna Sthal and Green Garden, Okhla Vihar metro station, All India Muslim Majlis-e-Mushawarat, Jamiatul Qasim Darul Uloom Al-Islamiah, Shaheen Bagh.
